title: Purely Grilled Mediterranean Saskatoon Berry Skewers
description: A quick and healthy weeknight dish featuring char-grilled Saskatoon berries with a Mediterranean twist, served in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the Saskatoon berries to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread 8-10 berries onto each bamboo skewer, leaving a small space between each berry.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and place them in a bamboo steamer lined with parchment paper.
Cover the steamer with a lid and let it rest for 2 minutes to allow the berries to steam slightly.
Serve the grilled Saskatoon berry skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
